burst: Designated Target: ATK ▼ 5.02% for 10 sec — enemy ATK debuff; inert (boss deals no damage, boss ATK feeds no ally-damage path). The 'Designated Target' STATUS itself IS modeled via targetStatus (opens the S2 1687% gate); only its ATK▼ magnitude is dropped.

caveats: ⚡ S2 rider crit (256.17% + 1687%) set true per the rider-crits-at-caster-rate prior — UNMEASURED; read popup colours to confirm.
⚡ Burst nuke (1407.64%) crit left OFF (unmeasured) and noFb:true (instant burst-cast lands pre-FB). Range is engine-auto (not set).
⚡ S1 Max-Ammo ▼50.66% roughly halves her magazine during FB → doubles last-bullet frequency → doubles S2 rider procs in-window; overall lastBullet cadence rides the unreliable datamined AR fire rate.
S2 block B (1687%) STACKS on top of block A (256.17%) on the same last-bullet hit whenever the boss carries Designated Target status — modelled as two independent lastBullet blocks, B gated.
override.note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚡ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Privaty (privaty, AR/Water/Attacker/B3): S1 = 4 all-ally buffs on FB-enter (ATK 23.61 / reload 51.16 / max-ammo -50.66 / attackDamage 20.16, 10s). S2 = last-bullet: boss Damage-Taken ▲10.01% + 256.17% on-hit rider, PLUS a Designated-Target-gated 1687% rider (status opened by her own burst). Burst = self Elemental-Advantage-Attack-Damage ▲130% (element-gated, inert vs neutral boss), a 1407.64% burst-skill nuke (noFb, instant), a 3s stun, and the Designated Target status (its enemy ATK▼5.02% is inert). Rider crit set true per prior; burst-nuke crit left off pending popup reads.

audit.effectOrReason: trigger fullBurstEnter, target allies (all incl. self)
buff maxAmmoPct -50.66 / 10s (halves magazine; raises last-bullet freq)

last bullet vs Designated Target status
Deals 1687% of final ATK addl dmg
audit.effectOrReason: flatDamage 1687, crit:true (⚡); stacks on 256.17% same hit
trigger burstCast (own-burst self mode), target self

flags.reasoning: Kit gives no crit text either way; prior says function-damage riders crit at the caster's sheet rate. Set true, but it is an assumption not a fact.
flags.recipe: Record privaty solo; read popup colours on her last-bullet additional-damage hits (orange body/icon = crit) and estimate the crit fraction vs her sheet crit rate.

flags.reasoning: Burst-skill damage crit is unmeasured; left OFF conservatively (distinct category from on-fire riders).
flags.recipe: Read the burst-nuke popup colour on a real cast; if orange, set crit:true.

flags.estimate: cadence from datamine (unreliable); FB roughly doubles rider procs
flags.reasoning: The -50.66% max ammo in S1 halves her FB magazine, so last-bullet fires ~2× as often in-window, doubling the 256.17%/1687% procs; base lastBullet frequency itself derives from the datamine-unreliable AR fire rate.
flags.recipe: Count last-bullet additional-damage popups per FB window from footage; back out effective magazine size and fire cadence.
